response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings extensive experience as a senior software engineer with a strong background in system design, microservices, and general performance optimization across various platforms. While his experience includes "AI-agent infrastructure" and embedded systems, the resume lacks explicit and in-depth experience required for a Principal Performance Architect focused on AI accelerators, including SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning specific workload analysis, and hardware-software co-design for AI performance trade-offs. His expertise appears to be more generalized software development rather than the specialized hardware-centric performance engineering this role demands.
strengths: Over 12 years of professional software development experience, exceeding seniority requirements.
Strong background in system architecture, microservices, and general performance optimization.
Experience with embedded systems and "AI-agent infrastructure."
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC and IP modeling or system-on-chip design feedback.
Limited direct experience in performance and power optimization specifically for AI accelerators or deep-learning workloads.
Lacks demonstrated expertise in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or deep neural network training/inference optimization.

key_factors.factor: SoC/IP Modeling & Deep Learning Workload Expertise
